\tzpentry{ID4822}{Holonomy Chemical Potential Expectation Value}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4822 introduces Holonomy Chemical Potential Expectation Value as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\oint_{\\partial \\Sigma} \\langle T^{\\mu\\nu} \\rangle_{\\text{vac}} n_\\mu d\\Sigma_nu = Res(TZP)$$
